历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 3818 → 3470 → 3316 → 4434 → 6508. Starting from 2024, the ranking significantly shifted backward. In 2025, it shifted backward by about 2074 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of approximately 6508. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 206, 207, 209, 213, and 224 respectively, showing a gradual annual expansion trend. The 2026 enrollment plan document is missing, so the specific number cannot be obtained; it is assumed to remain unchanged.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 39th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 38–41 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus bullying incidents, which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm. Douyin popularity ranking is 60th (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure. No record of enrollment gaps in recent years. Information and Communication Engineering A+, Electronic Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Cyberspace Security A, Mechanical Engineering A-. The university has outstanding disciplinary strengths in electronic information and computer fields, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, highly aligned with Xidian's core advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting candidates. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in the province is approximately 167,419, a decrease of about 5,928 (-3.4%) compared to 2025, slightly reducing competition. Xidian University is located in Shaanxi Province (neighboring province), close to Shanxi, with convenient transportation, exerting strong regional appeal to Shanxi candidates. The university has a large enrollment scale in Shanxi (200+ in Physics Category), making it a key source province outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of historical rankings, a 3.4% decrease in Physics Category candidates in 2026 slightly easing competition, a somewhat negative reputation slightly suppressing enthusiasm, but the sustained high popularity of Electronic Information/Computer majors supporting applications, based on the 2025 baseline of 6508, the ranking is expected to shift slightly forward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6408, with a range of 5908–6908.
